preconditions: User is not authenticated and is operating in guest state.
Home page load completes before interaction begins.

testCases.title: Verify Home page loads successfully in guest state using the approved entry URL
steps: Launch the application in a new browser session.
Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home.
Wait for the Home page to finish loading without performing any interaction.
testCases.expectedResult: The application loads the Home page successfully at http://localhost/washtabui/home in guest state without requiring authentication and the approved navigation controls are displayed.

testCases.title: Verify Person/Profile button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Person/Profile button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Person/Profile button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Back button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Back button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Back button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Notification button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Home button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Home button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Home button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Customer signup button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Customer signup button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Customer signup button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Clean survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Clean survey button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Clean survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify Site survey button is visible and enabled on the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Observe the Site survey button without clicking it.
testCases.expectedResult: The Site survey button is visible, enabled, and interactive on the Home page while the user remains in guest state.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to login page from the Person/Profile button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Person/Profile button once.
Wait for the navigation transition to complete.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to the login page and the resulting URL equals /washtabui/login?data=undefined.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to customer-search workflow from the Customer signup button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Customer signup button once.
Wait for the navigation transition to complete.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing customer-search.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to vehicle-survey workflow from the Clean survey button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Clean survey button once.
Wait for the navigation transition to complete.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing vehicle-survey.

testCases.title: Verify navigation to survey workflow from the Site survey button
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Site survey button once.
Wait for the navigation transition to complete.
testCases.expectedResult: The application navigates away from the Home page to a destination URL containing survey?data.

testCases.title: Verify Home button interaction does not break guest-state Home page accessibility
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Home button once.
Wait for any page activity to complete.
testCases.expectedResult: The application remains accessible in guest state and the user stays on or returns to the Home page with the approved navigation controls still visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Verify Back button interaction does not remove access to the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate directly to http://localhost/washtabui/home in a new browser session.
Click the Back button once.
Observe the resulting browser and application state.
testCases.expectedResult: The application does not enter an error state and the user either remains on the Home page or returns to the previous accessible browser location without unauthorized navigation.

testCases.title: Verify Notification button interaction is accessible from the Home page in guest state
steps: Navigate to http://localhost/washtabui/home as a guest user.
Click the Notification button once.
Observe the application response and current URL.
testCases.expectedResult: The Notification button accepts interaction without breaking the Home page session and the application remains responsive in guest state.
